description: Repair totals_by_customer so it returns total order amount by customer id while preserving first-seen canonical customer order. Read the customer from customer_id, customer.id, or customer, trimming string ids and skipping blank or missing customers. Ignore cancelled or void statuses after trimming and case-normalizing status values. Parse amounts from ints, floats, and numeric strings; missing, blank, or None amount is 0.
